reason: Name is REGENOVUE DEEP but image shows REGENOVUE DEEP PLUS (1.1ml, with Lidocaine). Wrong variant - DEEP and DEEP PLUS are distinct SKUs.
Image shows REGENOVUE DEEP PLUS Hyaluronic Acid Gel with Lidocaine 1.1ml. Brand and variant match the name REGENOVUE DEEP PLUS (CE).
Name is VOM LIGHT (CE) NO Lidocaine but image shows Elravie Premier LIGHT-L WITH LIDOCAINE. Wrong brand (Elravie vs VOM) and wrong lidocaine spec.
Name is NEURAMIS VOLUME LIDOCAINE but image shows Elravie Premier ULTRA VOLUME-L. Wrong brand (Elravie vs Neuramis).
Name is TESORO IMPLANT WITH LIDOCAINE but image shows HyalDew Mid HA filler. Wrong brand entirely.
Name is MAX Y FILL Body but image shows SEDY FILL Body Filler. Wrong brand (Sedy Fill vs Max Y Fill).
Name is REGENOVUE AQUASHINE PLUS GOLD but image shows generic REGENOVUE Aqua Shine Plus (Neogenesis, Skin Serum 3ml x 3). The GOLD variant is a distinct SKU not shown here.
Name is REGENOVUE AQUASHINE SILVER but image shows REGENOVUE Aqua Shine PLUS, not the SILVER variant. Wrong variant.
Name is ELAXEN PLLA MASK Poly-L but image shows PETARAN Poly PLLA (PLLA+PN) vial. Wrong brand (Petaran vs Elaxen) and wrong form factor (vial vs mask).
Image shows NMN Bottle NAD+ Booster with vial. Matches NMN BOTTLE NAD.
Image shows Pine Bottle packaging and vial. Matches PINE BOTTLE.
Name is RESTYLANE VITAL LIGHT LIDOCAINE (Galderma) but image shows Elravie Premier LIGHT-L with Lidocaine. Wrong brand entirely - Restylane is not Elravie.
